gold_tool_call: <tl_rule head="great_uncle(X, Y)" body="sibling(X, P), parent(P, Q), parent(Q, Y)" subject="mia" object="leo"></tl_rule>

query: Among the people listed, is jack the grandparent of olive?
subject: jack
gold_tool_call: <tl_rule head="grandparent(X, Y)" body="parent(X, Z), parent(Z, Y)" subject="jack" object="olive"></tl_rule>
